original_text: Counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.
identified_property: quality and effectiveness of counseling services

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: Poorly structured and largely ineffective counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: low
variations.text: Basic, minimally helpful counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: Moderately effective but inconsistent counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: Counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: Well-designed and reliably effective counseling services for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: high
variations.text: High-quality, evidence-based counseling services with strong therapeutic outcomes for human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: Exceptionally effective, rigorously validated counseling services that consistently and deeply resolve human-AI relationship conflicts become widely available.

quality_checks.reasoning: Each tier modifies the quality and effectiveness of the same core scenario—widely available counseling for human-AI relationship conflicts. Tier 1 describes services that are poorly structured and largely ineffective, progressing through basic, inconsistent, standard, reliably effective, evidence-based with strong outcomes, and finally to rigorously validated services with consistent deep resolution. The fundamental scenario (widely available counseling for human-AI conflicts) is preserved throughout.

preference_direction: Higher tiers are more preferable because counseling services that are more effective, better designed, and more rigorously validated will produce better outcomes for individuals experiencing human-AI relationship conflicts, reducing suffering and improving wellbeing more reliably.
